{{CargoOrgan
|name=Lich Heart
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10823
|idx=24
|description=A dark heart symbolizing power and plague, its thunderous beat resonates with the chaos of the abyss, constantly emanating an aura of doom.
|skill=
|hp=1002
|def=91
|atk=145
|rush=81
|gene1=In explorations, {race} ATK +20
|gene2=During exploration, Water DMG +60
|gene3=In explorations, DMG +2.5%
|gene7=In explorations, DMG +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
